articles.title: ପେଟ ପାଇଁ ଖରା ସହ ଲଢ଼େଇ | Heatwave In Odisha! Balasore Burns at 38°C | Street Vendors Struggle Hard - Kanak News Odisha
articles.full_text:
Odisha is facing a severe heatwave and Balasore district is burning under extreme conditions.
While the thermometer shows 33°C, the real feel is a scorching 38°C — turning daily life unbearable.
In Balasore, rising humidity has worsened the situation, making normal life extremely difficult. Street-side vendors selling coconut water, sugarcane juice, watermelon, and lemon water are among the worst affected. Ironically, those who are helping people fight thirst are themselves struggling under the blazing sun.
Without fans, AC, or proper shelter, these small vendors rely only on umbrellas and wet cloths to survive the intense heat. Elderly vendors are facing even greater hardship as they continue working for their livelihood despite the risk of heatstroke.
